A CSS hover effect refers to a visual change that occurs when a user moves their cursor over a button. ## Why Use Modern CSS Buttons? ## CSS Techniques Used to Create Modern Buttons. Modern web design in 2026 uses a variety of CSS techniques to create highly dynamic and visually impressive buttons.
